text.tspan: CACHE-ASIDE: the application talks to BOTH cache and DB.
The cache is a separate, independent store; nothing keeps them in sync automatically.

g.text: WRITE PATH (most common: write-through-DB, invalidate cache)

text.tspan: u2022 cache update + DB update can race
u2022 if cache write succeeds but DB write fails u2192 cache holds wrong value forever
u2022 deleting is idempotent and safe u2014 worst case: extra DB read
u2022 'cache is a cache, not a database' u2014 it can always be rebuilt

g.text: 2a. HIT u2192 return value u2705 (done, fast)

text.tspan: next read will re-populate from DB
